DEPT 1/JUDGE CHOPPELAS/REPORTER:M.BRADY/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ATNY JOHN ZANGHI PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT JOANN JOSHUA PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE SIGNED STIP AND JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOSHUA, JOANN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 480 ELLIS STREET #106, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,290.00 RENT, $250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $123.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,663.00, STAYED UNTIL AUG-21-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, EXEC ON MONEY JUDGMNT STAYED AS LONG AS DEFT PAYS $850 TO PLTF IN 10 INSTALLMENT. SEE STIP FOR PAYMENT PLAN.
